#  Remove a Change Event Associated with a T&M Ticket 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Change Events tool  
AND
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's T&M Tickets tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To successfully remove any associated line items created for Labor, Material, Equipment, Subcontractors and Descriptions navigate to the Project's Change Event tool and delete all related items.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a T&M Ticket](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/create-a-tm-ticket)
  * [Create a Change Event from a T&M Ticket](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-a-tm-ticket)
  * [Add a T&M Ticket to a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/add-a-tm-ticket-to-a-change-event)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **T &M Tickets** tool.
  2. Under the **All Tickets** tab, do the following:
     * Locate the T&M tickets associated with the change event you want to remove.
  3. Click **Edit** next to the T&M Ticket.   
![Tm Tickets List](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/af0e110f7f8f2f870b2ec0e042b3e509/e1161be4cfeb7db16e36bd41d905b3dd/tm-tickets-list.png?fm=webp&h=288)
  4. Under the **General** tab in the **General Information** section located the Change Events field.  
![Change Events Field](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fc0eb4a47641edfdaa876366e08a7cee/b93f474ee3367089e93bb9ce5057ff53/change-events-field.png?fm=webp&h=395)
  5. Click the ![Icon X Remove Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f267e010b2e9589eec9d83b774ec5939/bc2f0945e95d2dd8102b7079e92b9ae8/icon-x-remove-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=15) remove button next to the Change Event you want to remove.
  6. In the Remove link to Change Event window, do the following:
     * Click **Confirm and go to Change Event** to remove the associated change event from the ticket and navigate to the Project's Change event tool to remove associated line items.   
OR
     * Click **Confirm** to remove the Change Event if you have already removed the transferred values for Labor, Material, Equipment, Subcontractors, and Description from the associated Change Event.  
![Remove Change Event Window](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7fc8e9d65cf0c756437bda85060c6768/487010645e61564c81071fa09fd0c52f/remove-change-event-window.png?fm=webp&h=385)


_Notes_ :
  * The Change Event appears as a hyperlink when viewing or editing a T&M Ticket so you can quickly navigate to the associated Change Event.
  * If you delete a Change Event associated with a T&M Ticket the association will be automatically removed so that you can add or create a new change event.


## See Also
  * [Create a Change Event from a T&M Ticket](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-a-tm-ticket)
  * [Manage T&M Tickets](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/manage-tm-tickets)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: T&M Tickets](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-tm-tickets)
title: Remove a Change Event Associated with a T&M Ticket
description: How to remove a Change Event Associated with a T&M Ticket.
